05 / Mountains

Above the
ordinary.

Alpine trails, meadow lunches, and cabins that feel older than the wifi.

09 days From $3,140 Host Mateo 4 seats left

Dolomites

Mateo says the mountain decides the itinerary — and he means it. You’ll walk ridgelines, eat in meadows, and sleep at Ridge Cabin where the wifi is optional and the window is not.

Nine days gives you room to climb hard one morning and sit still the next. The point isn’t peaks collected. It’s weather lived through.

Day 01
Arrive soft

Cabin keys, valley walk, dinner that starts early because the light does.

Day 02–04
Wander wide

Classic ridge circuits and meadow days with Mateo reading the sky.

Day 05
Feast slowly

Alpine cookout. Stories exchanged like currency.

Day 06–08
Go deep

Higher day for willing legs; lake loops for everyone else.

Day 09
Leave lighter

Dawn coffee. Last look. Soft descent.

Trip details

  • Length09 days
  • From$3,140
  • HostMateo
  • StayRidge Cabin
  • DatesSep 8–16 · 2026
  • Seats4 seats left
